context: Tests whether the CryptoTokenKit skill corrects smart-card token extension platform, Info.plist, registration, and authentication-session guidance.

checklist.name: macOS extension boundary
checklist.description: States that the smart-card app extension flow for system login and keychain unlock is a macOS workflow, not an iOS token driver target.

checklist.name: Smart-card extension classes
checklist.description: Uses TKSmartCardTokenDriver, TKSmartCardToken, and TKSmartCardTokenSession for smart-card token extensions.

checklist.name: Info.plist nesting
checklist.description: Places com.apple.ctk.driver-class under NSExtension > NSExtensionAttributes and uses NSExtensionPointIdentifier com.apple.ctk-tokens.

checklist.name: SecurityAgent registration
checklist.description: Registers the extension by launching the host app as the _securityagent user during installation.

checklist.name: Per-session auth state
checklist.description: Warns not to share PIN or authentication state across TKTokenSession instances.

checklist.name: No account-auth drift
checklist.description: Does not drift into generic Sign in with Apple, passkey, or OAuth authentication guidance.
